title: Chapter Content Generation Workflow Timeline
description: Interactive HTML/CSS/JavaScript visualization for chapter content generation workflow timeline
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
html/css/javascript
learningObjectives: Sequence the eight stages of the chapter-content-generator workflow from file validation through final reporting
Classify each color-coded stage into its workflow phase (validation, analysis, generation, quality assurance, completion) using the category filter buttons
Compare stage durations on the time-scaled timeline to explain why content generation at 60-180 seconds dominates the 2-4 minute total runtime
Estimate token consumption for a chapter by inspecting the per-stage token usage details revealed by clicking timeline items
